name: becoming-supernatural
description: Dr. Joe Dispenza's 'Becoming Supernatural: How Common People Are Doing the Uncommon' — a science-based toolkit for transcending ordinary reality by changing brain waves, heart coherence, and energy to heal, transform, and create a new life.
useCase: Heal chronic conditions, break deeply ingrained patterns, and manifest a new reality by combining neuroscience, quantum physics, and meditation practices.
knownRisks: Dispenza's work blends empirical science with claims that go beyond mainstream scientific consensus — present the science and the mysticism accurately
The practices require significant time commitment (30-60 min daily) — casual attempts may not produce results
Not a substitute for medical treatment — frame as complementary practice alongside professional healthcare
